revelaciones.title: Identity Revelation Requests
revelaciones.subtitle: Manage requests to link DIDs with civil identities
revelaciones.howItWorksDesc: When you need to link a citizen's DID (pseudonym) with their civil identity for a case, you send a request. The citizen will receive a notification in their DApp and must explicitly authorize it before you can access their identity.
revelaciones.noRequestsDesc: Requests will appear here when you send them from a case
